privacy.heroDesc: Your trust is our most valuable asset. We are committed to safeguarding your personal information.
privacy.principlesDesc: Every decision we make is guided by these core principles.
privacy.dataDesc: We believe in radical transparency about what we collect and why.
privacy.right1Desc: Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
privacy.right3Desc: Request complete removal of your data from our systems.
privacy.right4Desc: Transfer your data to another service provider.
privacy.ctaDesc: Our privacy team is here to help.
